sentences.en: Main Getaways - Boundaries between parts in a town are usually just in people’s minds but it’s better if they are physical as well.
sentences.zh: 主要度假胜地 - 城镇中各部分之间的边界通常只存在于人们的脑海中，但如果它们也存在于实体中就更好了。

sentences.en: Gateways can be many things - a literal gate, a bridge, a narrow passage, or an avenue of trees.
sentences.zh: 网关可以是很多东西——真正的大门、桥梁、狭窄的通道或树木大道。

blocks.html_en: 54. Road Crossing - Cars can scare people away from walking near roads even if places that people have the legal right-of-way. Narrow the road where the pedestrian path is, raise the path, put in islanders between driving lanes, and add a canopy to keep the path visible to cars.

sentences.en: Road Crossing - Cars can scare people away from walking near roads even if places that people have the legal right-of-way.
sentences.zh: 道路交叉口——汽车可能会吓跑人们，不敢在道路附近行走，即使人们拥有合法的通行权。

sentences.en: Narrow the road where the pedestrian path is, raise the path, put in islanders between driving lanes, and add a canopy to keep the path visible to cars.
sentences.zh: 缩小人行道所在的道路，抬高道路，在行车道之间放置岛民，并添加天篷以保持道路对汽车可见。

blocks.html_en: 55. Raised Walk - Pedestrian paths near fast-moving roads should be ~18 inches above the road, on only one side of the road, include a low wall or railing to mark the edge, and twice as wide as a normal sidewalk.

sentences.en: Raised Walk - Pedestrian paths near fast-moving roads should be ~18 inches above the road, on only one side of the road, include a low wall or railing to mark the edge, and twice as wide as a normal sidewalk.
sentences.zh: 升高的人行道 - 快速行驶的道路附近的人行道应高于道路约 18 英寸，仅在道路的一侧，包括矮墙或栏杆来标记边缘，宽度是正常人行道的两倍。

blocks.html_en: 56. Bike Paths and Racks - Bikes are cheap, healthy and great for the environment, but the environment is not made with them in mind. There needs to be paths designated for bikes - marked clearly, run on the sunny side of local roads and come within 100 ft of every building.

sentences.en: Bike Paths and Racks - Bikes are cheap, healthy and great for the environment, but the environment is not made with them in mind.
sentences.zh: 自行车道和自行车架——自行车便宜、健康并且对环境有益，但环境的设计并没有考虑到它们。

sentences.en: There needs to be paths designated for bikes - marked clearly, run on the sunny side of local roads and come within 100 ft of every building.
sentences.zh: 需要指定自行车道 - 标记清晰，在当地道路向阳的一侧行驶，并且距离每栋建筑物 100 英尺以内。

blocks.html_en: 57. Children in the City - Children need to explore the world around them and learn to become adults; yet cities are too dangerous for kids to explore freely. Make parts of the bike network extra safe, with no cars or major road crossing. Homes and shops to keep eyes on the path.

sentences.en: Children in the City - Children need to explore the world around them and learn to become adults; yet cities are too dangerous for kids to explore freely.
sentences.zh: 城市里的孩子——孩子们需要探索周围的世界，并学习如何成为成年人；然而城市对于孩子们来说太危险了，无法自由探索。

sentences.en: Make parts of the bike network extra safe, with no cars or major road crossing.
sentences.zh: 使部分自行车网络更加安全，没有汽车或主要道路交叉口。

sentences.en: Homes and shops to keep eyes on the path.
sentences.zh: 住宅和商店都要留意道路。

blocks.html_en: 58. Carnival - There is a need for socially sanctioned activities; which are the social, outward expression of dreaming. These experiences allow people to reveal their madness and unleash these desires without being destructive.

sentences.en: Carnival - There is a need for socially sanctioned activities; which are the social, outward expression of dreaming.
sentences.zh: 狂欢节——需要社会认可的活动；这是梦的社会性、外在表现。

sentences.en: These experiences allow people to reveal their madness and unleash these desires without being destructive.
sentences.zh: 这些经历让人们能够在不造成破坏的情况下揭露他们的疯狂并释放这些欲望。

blocks.html_en: 59. Quiet Backs - People need quiet natural spaces to refresh themselves after working around noise and people during the day. Buildings in busy areas should have a quiet area behind them with enough space to walk, and far enough from the building so that it gets full sunlight.

sentences.en: Quiet Backs - People need quiet natural spaces to refresh themselves after working around noise and people during the day.
sentences.zh: 安静的背部——白天在噪音和人群中工作后，人们需要安静的自然空间来恢复精力。

sentences.en: Buildings in busy areas should have a quiet area behind them with enough space to walk, and far enough from the building so that it gets full sunlight.
sentences.zh: 繁忙地区的建筑物后面应该有一个安静的区域，有足够的步行空间，并且距离建筑物足够远，以便获得充足的阳光。

blocks.html_en: 60. Accessible Garden - People need green open spaces. Scatter them so they are close to every house workplace, ideally less 3 minutes away. This is usually where parks fall short, they are large and widely spread out through the city.

sentences.en: Accessible Garden - People need green open spaces.
sentences.zh: 无障碍花园——人们需要绿色开放空间。

sentences.en: Scatter them so they are close to every house workplace, ideally less 3 minutes away.
sentences.zh: 将它们分散到靠近每个家庭工作场所的地方，最好是不到 3 分钟的路程。

sentences.en: This is usually where parks fall short, they are large and widely spread out through the city.
sentences.zh: 这通常是公园的不足之处，它们很大并且广泛分布在城市中。

blocks.html_en: 61. Small Public Squares - Every town needs a square, yet too large and they feel deserted. Build them smaller than you think. The short side (width) should be < 70 ft. across, ideally 45-60 ft. ~70 ft is the max distance people can see facial expressions and easily communicate.

sentences.en: Small Public Squares - Every town needs a square, yet too large and they feel deserted.
sentences.zh: 小型公共广场——每个城镇都需要一个广场，但广场太大又会让人感觉荒芜。

sentences.en: Build them smaller than you think.
sentences.zh: 将它们建造得比您想象的要小。

sentences.en: The short side (width) should be < 70 ft.
sentences.zh: 短边（宽度）应小于 70 英尺。

sentences.en: across, ideally 45-60 ft. ~70 ft is the max distance people can see facial expressions and easily communicate.
sentences.zh: 跨度，理想情况是 45-60 英尺。~70 英尺是人们可以看到面部表情并轻松交流的最大距离。

blocks.html_en: 62. High Places - The instinct to climb up to a higher place and look down to survey your world is fundamental in humans. Make the high points in a city landmarks. Can be natural topography or the highest roofs, but they should include a physical climb to reach the top.

sentences.en: High Places - The instinct to climb up to a higher place and look down to survey your world is fundamental in humans.
sentences.zh: 高处 - 爬到更高的地方并俯视世界的本能是人类的基本本能。

sentences.en: Make the high points in a city landmarks.
sentences.zh: 打造城市地标的制高点。

sentences.en: Can be natural topography or the highest roofs, but they should include a physical climb to reach the top.
sentences.zh: 可以是自然地形或最高的屋顶，但它们应该包括物理攀登以到达顶部。

blocks.html_en: 63. Dancing in the Street - All over the earth people once danced in the streets as a form of joy. This has died in technically sophisticated parts of the world. Place a raised bandstand in pockets of activity, cover it and have paved surfaces nearby for dancing.

sentences.en: Dancing in the Street - All over the earth people once danced in the streets as a form of joy.
sentences.zh: 在街上跳舞——世界各地的人们曾经在街上跳舞作为一种欢乐的形式。

sentences.en: This has died in technically sophisticated parts of the world.
sentences.zh: 这种做法在世界上技术先进的地区已经消亡。

sentences.en: Place a raised bandstand in pockets of activity, cover it and have paved surfaces nearby for dancing.
sentences.zh: 在活动区域​​放置一个升高的演奏台，盖上它，并在附近铺好可供跳舞的表面。

blocks.html_en: 64. Pools and Streams - We are made of water and water plays a large role in our psychology. In order to have the daily access to water that we need, all forms of it (rainwater, streams, reservoirs, etc.) should be exposed and preserved.

sentences.en: Pools and Streams - We are made of water and water plays a large role in our psychology.
sentences.zh: 水池和溪流——我们是由水组成的，水在我们的心理中发挥着重要作用。

sentences.en: In order to have the daily access to water that we need, all forms of it (rainwater, streams, reservoirs, etc.) should be exposed and preserved.
sentences.zh: 为了获得我们日常所需的水，所有形式的水（雨水、溪流、水库等）都应该暴露并保存。

blocks.html_en: 65. Birth Places - Childbirth is a family event that is a natural part of the community. It shouldn't be treated as a sickness from which to recover from. Build local places where women go to have children. Educate fathers and provide midwives for support at these places.

sentences.en: Birth Places - Childbirth is a family event that is a natural part of the community.
sentences.zh: 出生地 - 分娩是一项家庭活动，也是社区的自然组成部分。

sentences.en: It shouldn't be treated as a sickness from which to recover from.
sentences.zh: 它不应该被视为一种需要康复的疾病。

sentences.en: Build local places where women go to have children.
sentences.zh: 在当地建造妇女可以生孩子的场所。

sentences.en: Educate fathers and provide midwives for support at these places.
sentences.zh: 在这些地方对父亲进行教育并为助产士提供支持。

blocks.html_en: 66. Holy Ground - Birth, puberty, marriage, and death are fundamental human rites. When they are treated with power and respect, they are given a physical place to act as a needed gateway.

sentences.en: Holy Ground - Birth, puberty, marriage, and death are fundamental human rites.
sentences.zh: 圣地 - 出生、青春期、婚姻和死亡是人类的基本仪式。

sentences.en: When they are treated with power and respect, they are given a physical place to act as a needed gateway.
sentences.zh: 当他们受到权力和尊重时，他们就获得了一个物理位置来充当所需的门户。

blocks.html_en: 67. Common Land - This space has 2 main functions. 1. Allows people to feel comfortable outside and 2. provides a meeting ground for activities that clusters of houses naturally share. 25% of the land in house clusters should be common use, without cars primarily using the space.

sentences.en: Common Land - This space has 2 main functions.
sentences.zh: 公共土地 - 该空间有两个主要功能。

sentences.en: Allows people to feel comfortable outside and 2.
sentences.zh: 使人们在户外感到舒适 2.

sentences.en: provides a meeting ground for activities that clusters of houses naturally share.
sentences.zh: 为房屋群自然共享的活动提供了一个聚会场所。

sentences.en: 25% of the land in house clusters should be common use, without cars primarily using the space.
sentences.zh: 住宅群内25%的土地应为公共用途，且不以汽车为主。

blocks.html_en: 68. Connected Play - Children need other children as much as their own mothers for healthy development. Common land, paths, gardens, and bridges that are connected away from traffic should be established as play space for kids.

sentences.en: Connected Play - Children need other children as much as their own mothers for healthy development.
sentences.zh: 互联玩耍——孩子们需要其他孩子，就像他们自己的母亲一样，才能健康成长。

sentences.en: Common land, paths, gardens, and bridges that are connected away from traffic should be established as play space for kids.
sentences.zh: 远离交通的公共土地、小路、花园和桥梁应作为儿童的游乐空间。

blocks.html_en: 69. Public Outdoor Room - Make a part of the common land an outdoor room. Partly enclosed, some roof, columns, few walls, and place it within view of homes and workplaces. People passing through and who live nearby will finish it with whatever they feel is missing.

sentences.en: Public Outdoor Room - Make a part of the common land an outdoor room.
sentences.zh: 公共室外房间 - 将公共土地的一部分设置为室外房间。

sentences.en: Partly enclosed, some roof, columns, few walls, and place it within view of homes and workplaces.
sentences.zh: 部分封闭，有一些屋顶、柱子、很少的墙壁，并将其放置在家庭和工作场所的视野范围内。

sentences.en: People passing through and who live nearby will finish it with whatever they feel is missing.
sentences.zh: 路过的人和住在附近的人都会用他们觉得缺少的东西来完成它。

blocks.html_en: 70. Grave Sites - The presence of the dead interspersed with the living is a daily reminder to encourage people to live. Avoid massive cemeteries. Use small pieces of land throughout the community as grave sites, all with an edge, path, or quiet corner where people can sit.

sentences.en: Grave Sites - The presence of the dead interspersed with the living is a daily reminder to encourage people to live.
sentences.zh: 墓地——死者与生者的存在每天都在提醒人们，鼓励人们活下去。

sentences.en: Avoid massive cemeteries.
sentences.zh: 避免大型墓地。

sentences.en: Use small pieces of land throughout the community as grave sites, all with an edge, path, or quiet corner where people can sit.
sentences.zh: 使用社区中的小块土地作为墓地，所有土地都有边缘、路径或安静的角落供人们坐下。

blocks.html_en: 71. Still Water - People should have the ability to swim daily and access pools or ponds within minutes. The entrance should be on the shallow side and gradually get deeper Natural edges (1-2 inches deep to start) have kept kids safe alongside oceans, rivers, and lakes forever.

sentences.en: Still Water - People should have the ability to swim daily and access pools or ponds within minutes.
sentences.zh: 静止的水——人们应该能够每天游泳并在几分钟内进入游泳池或池塘。

sentences.en: The entrance should be on the shallow side and gradually get deeper Natural edges (1-2 inches deep to start) have kept kids safe alongside oceans, rivers, and lakes forever.
sentences.zh: 入口应位于较浅的一侧，然后逐渐变深。天然边缘（开始时深 1-2 英寸）可以永远保证孩子们在海洋、河流和湖泊旁边的安全。

blocks.html_en: 72. Local Sports - The human body wears down when it's not used. A natural way to get people using their bodies more is integrating local sports as part of each neighborhood. Make the action visible, inviting passers-by to join in.

sentences.en: Local Sports - The human body wears down when it's not used.
sentences.zh: 当地运动——人体不使用时就会磨损。

sentences.en: A natural way to get people using their bodies more is integrating local sports as part of each neighborhood.
sentences.zh: 让人们更多地利用自己的身体的一个自然方法是将当地体育运动融入每个社区。

sentences.en: Make the action visible, inviting passers-by to join in.
sentences.zh: 让行动可见，邀请路人加入。

blocks.html_en: 73. Adventure Playground - Play is crucial, especially for children; providing:

sentences.en: Adventure Playground - Play is crucial, especially for children; providing:
sentences.zh: 冒险乐园——玩耍是至关重要的，尤其是对于孩子来说；提供：

blocks.html_en: • - a chance to be together

sentences.en: - a chance to be together
sentences.zh: - 在一起的机会

blocks.html_en: - a chance to be together

sentences.en: - a chance to be together
sentences.zh: - 在一起的机会

blocks.html_en: • - use their bodies

sentences.en: - use their bodies
sentences.zh: - 使用他们的身体

blocks.html_en: - use their bodies

sentences.en: - use their bodies
sentences.zh: - 使用他们的身体

blocks.html_en: • - build muscles

sentences.en: - build muscles
sentences.zh: - 锻炼肌肉

blocks.html_en: - build muscles

sentences.en: - build muscles
sentences.zh: - 锻炼肌肉

blocks.html_en: • - test new skills

sentences.en: - test new skills
sentences.zh: - 测试新技能

blocks.html_en: - test new skills

sentences.en: - test new skills
sentences.zh: - 测试新技能

blocks.html_en:
• - stretch their imagination.

    Set up a space full of raw materials where children can build their own playgrounds.

sentences.en: - stretch their imagination.
sentences.zh: - 拓展他们的想象力。

sentences.en: Set up a space full of raw materials where children can build their own playgrounds.
sentences.zh: 建立一个充满原材料的空间，让孩子们可以建造自己的游乐场。

blocks.html_en: - stretch their imagination.

sentences.en: - stretch their imagination.
sentences.zh: - 拓展他们的想象力。

blocks.html_en: Set up a space full of raw materials where children can build their own playgrounds.

sentences.en: Set up a space full of raw materials where children can build their own playgrounds.
sentences.zh: 建立一个充满原材料的空间，让孩子们可以建造自己的游乐场。

blocks.html_en: 74. Animals - Access to animals in a city is just as important as trees, parks, grass, and flowers. They may play a vital role in children's emotional development and ability to connect with other people, friends, and family members.

sentences.en: Animals - Access to animals in a city is just as important as trees, parks, grass, and flowers.
sentences.zh: 动物——在城市中接触动物与树木、公园、草地和花卉一样重要。

sentences.en: They may play a vital role in children's emotional development and ability to connect with other people, friends, and family members.
sentences.zh: 它们可能在儿童的情感发展以及与其他人、朋友和家庭成员的联系能力方面发挥着至关重要的作用。

blocks.html_en: 75. The Family - A nuclear family doesn't work. It's important that a household has ~ a dozen people around them, to find comfort and relationships that sustain them during ups and downs. Humans used to have extended family (~ 3 generations) living as a loosely-knit household.

sentences.en: The Family - A nuclear family doesn't work.
sentences.zh: 家庭——核心家庭是行不通的。

sentences.en: It's important that a household has ~ a dozen people around them, to find comfort and relationships that sustain them during ups and downs.
sentences.zh: 一个家庭周围有十几个人是很重要的，这样才能在起起落落时找到支撑他们的安慰和关系。

sentences.en: Humans used to have extended family (~ 3 generations) living as a loosely-knit household.
sentences.zh: 人类曾经有一个大家庭（〜3代），生活在一个松散的家庭中。

blocks.html_en: 76. House for a Small Family - To balance the clean and quiet of adult needs with the toys and disarray of children, a small house needs three distinct areas.

sentences.en: House for a Small Family - To balance the clean and quiet of adult needs with the toys and disarray of children, a small house needs three distinct areas.
sentences.zh: 小家庭的房子——为了平衡成人需要的干净、安静与孩子的玩具和混乱，小房子需要三个不同的区域。

blocks.html_en: 1. Couple's realm

sentences.en: Couple's realm
sentences.zh: 夫妻境界

blocks.html_en: 2. Children's realm

sentences.en: Children's realm
sentences.zh: 儿童领域

blocks.html_en: 3. Common area connected to both (1) and (2)

sentences.en: Common area connected to both (1) and (2)
sentences.zh: 连接到 (1) 和 (2) 的公共区域

blocks.html_en: 77. House for a Couple - When a house is shared by just two people, the most pressing problem to address is allowing each to have enough opportunity for solitude and privacy when needed. Create a house with both shared and private spaces.

sentences.en: House for a Couple - When a house is shared by just two people, the most pressing problem to address is allowing each to have enough opportunity for solitude and privacy when needed.
sentences.zh: 情侣之家 - 当只有两个人共用一套房子时，最紧迫的问题是让每个人在需要时都有足够的机会独处和隐私。

sentences.en: Create a house with both shared and private spaces.
sentences.zh: 创建一个既有共享空间又有私人空间的房子。

blocks.html_en: 78. House for One Person - The most critical issue is a need for simplicity. Every item in the house is placed for the simplest necessity and should support the person’s life directly. Ideally one central space, with nooks small alcoves around it.

sentences.en: House for One Person - The most critical issue is a need for simplicity.
sentences.zh: 一个人的房子——最关键的问题是需要简单。

sentences.en: Every item in the house is placed for the simplest necessity and should support the person’s life directly.
sentences.zh: 房子里的每件物品都是为了最简单的必需品而放置的，并且应该直接支持人的生活。

sentences.en: Ideally one central space, with nooks small alcoves around it.
sentences.zh: 理想情况下是一个中央空间，周围有角落小凹室。

blocks.html_en: 79. Your Own Home - People will not feel genuinely comfortable in a place that they rent. It's important to provide everyone ownership of control over their house and have a space for a garden or terrace. They need the power and opportunity to modify and repair their own place.

sentences.en: Your Own Home - People will not feel genuinely comfortable in a place that they rent.
sentences.zh: 你自己的家——人们在租用的地方不会感到真正舒适。

sentences.en: It's important to provide everyone ownership of control over their house and have a space for a garden or terrace.
sentences.zh: 让每个人都拥有对自己房子的控制权，并拥有一个花园或露台的空间，这一点很重要。

sentences.en: They need the power and opportunity to modify and repair their own place.
sentences.zh: 他们需要权力和机会来改造和修复自己的地方。

blocks.html_en: 80. Self-governing Workshops and Offices - People enjoy their work when they can understand the big picture and feel responsible for the group’s success. Work is instrumental to living and feeling fulfilled in a community. Work teams should be small and focused.

sentences.en: Self-governing Workshops and Offices - People enjoy their work when they can understand the big picture and feel responsible for the group’s success.
sentences.zh: 自治车间和办公室——当人们能够了解大局并感到对团队的成功负有责任时，他们就会享受他们的工作。

sentences.en: Work is instrumental to living and feeling fulfilled in a community.
sentences.zh: 工作有助于在社区中生活并感到满足。

sentences.en: Work teams should be small and focused.
sentences.zh: 工作团队应该小而集中。

blocks.html_en: 81. Small Services without Red Tape - When public service departments get too large they lose their human qualities, which leads them to break. If they are “fixed” with red tape, they become more bureaucratic, politicized, and inefficient.

sentences.en: Small Services without Red Tape - When public service departments get too large they lose their human qualities, which leads them to break.
sentences.zh: 没有繁文缛节的小型服务——当公共服务部门规模太大时，他们就会失去人文素质，从而导致崩溃。

sentences.en: If they are “fixed” with red tape, they become more bureaucratic, politicized, and inefficient.
sentences.zh: 如果他们被繁文缛节所“固定”，他们就会变得更加官僚化、政治化和效率低下。

blocks.html_en: 82. Office Connections - If teams are placed more than one floor apart in a work space, there will be almost no communication between the two. Figure out the nuisance distance and coordinate teams to remain below this threshold.

sentences.en: Office Connections - If teams are placed more than one floor apart in a work space, there will be almost no communication between the two.
sentences.zh: 办公室连接——如果团队在工作空间中相隔一层以上，则两者之间几乎没有沟通。

sentences.en: Figure out the nuisance distance and coordinate teams to remain below this threshold.
sentences.zh: 找出滋扰距离并协调团队保持低于此阈值。

blocks.html_en: 83. Master and Apprentice - The most powerful, effective, and simple way to learn is to help someone who really knows what they are doing. Work and learning go hand in hand. A workspace should be divided into clusters, where masters and apprentices can work and meet together.

sentences.en: Master and Apprentice - The most powerful, effective, and simple way to learn is to help someone who really knows what they are doing.
sentences.zh: 师徒——最强大、最有效、最简单的学习方法是帮助那些真正知道自己在做什么的人。

sentences.en: Work and learning go hand in hand.
sentences.zh: 工作和学习齐头并进。

sentences.en: A workspace should be divided into clusters, where masters and apprentices can work and meet together.
sentences.zh: 工作空间应划分为多个集群，师傅和徒弟可以在其中一起工作和聚会。

blocks.html_en: 84. Teen-Age Society - The passage between childhood and adulthood needs to contain time for teenagers to explore the adult world, step back, and then explore again. Teenagers need a space to take on and learn the responsibility and discipline that’s found in the adult world.

sentences.en: Teen-Age Society - The passage between childhood and adulthood needs to contain time for teenagers to explore the adult world, step back, and then explore again.
sentences.zh: 青少年社会——童年和成年之间的过渡需要留出时间让青少年探索成人世界，退后一步，然后再次探索。

sentences.en: Teenagers need a space to take on and learn the responsibility and discipline that’s found in the adult world.
sentences.zh: 青少年需要一个空间来承担和学习成人世界中的责任和纪律。

blocks.html_en: 85. Shopfront Schools - Children have a need to learn by doing and make their mark on the community. This is an opportunity to teach basic skills and build habits of learning they can use for the rest of their lives. Kids 7-12 should learn in tiny independent. schools.

sentences.en: Shopfront Schools - Children have a need to learn by doing and make their mark on the community.
sentences.zh: 店面学校——孩子们需要边做边学，并在社区中留下自己的印记。

sentences.en: This is an opportunity to teach basic skills and build habits of learning they can use for the rest of their lives.
sentences.zh: 这是一个教授基本技能和培养他们终生受益的学习习惯的机会。

sentences.en: Kids 7-12 should learn in tiny independent.
sentences.zh: 7-12 岁的孩子应该在小型独立环境中学习。

sentences.en: schools.
sentences.zh: 学校。

blocks.html_en: 86. Children’s Home - A place kids can stay for an hour or a week, different than baby-sitting. A space where they are safe and looked after with a full range of social activities that introduce them to society and expose them to adults and children of other ages.

sentences.en: Children’s Home - A place kids can stay for an hour or a week, different than baby-sitting.
sentences.zh: 儿童之家 - 孩子们可以呆一个小时或一周的地方，与保姆不同。

sentences.en: A space where they are safe and looked after with a full range of social activities that introduce them to society and expose them to adults and children of other ages.
sentences.zh: 一个让他们安全并受到照顾的空间，提供全方位的社交活动，将他们介绍给社会，并让他们接触其他年龄段的成人和儿童。

blocks.html_en: 87. Individually Owned Shops - Small, individually-owned shops keep the wealth generated by a community in the hands of that community. Large, absentee-owned shops become bland, less personal, and make it harder for smaller shops to survive.

sentences.en: Individually Owned Shops - Small, individually-owned shops keep the wealth generated by a community in the hands of that community.
sentences.zh: 个体工商户——小型个体工商户将社区产生的财富掌握在该社区手中。

sentences.en: Large, absentee-owned shops become bland, less personal, and make it harder for smaller shops to survive.
sentences.zh: 缺席经营的大型商店变得平淡无奇、缺乏个性化，这让小商店的生存变得更加困难。

blocks.html_en: 88. Street Cafe - These cafes and their terraces provide a place to sit, relax, watch a large volume of people pass by and be very public in each neighborhood. The special quality being that a person can sit for hours! There is not a pace to keep up with or pressure to leave.

sentences.en: Street Cafe - These cafes and their terraces provide a place to sit, relax, watch a large volume of people pass by and be very public in each neighborhood.
sentences.zh: 街头咖啡馆 - 这些咖啡馆及其露台提供了一个坐下来放松的地方，可以观看大量的人流经过，并且在每个社区都非常公开。

sentences.en: The special quality being that a person can sit for hours!
sentences.zh: 特殊的品质是一个人可以坐几个小时！

sentences.en: There is not a pace to keep up with or pressure to leave.
sentences.zh: 没有跟上的步伐，也没有离开的压力。

blocks.html_en: 89. Corner Grocery - The stores are generators of walks. When you want to grab eggs and also feel like a walk, they entice you to get out and accomplish both. Developers think people don't want to walk to local stores; this is wrong.

sentences.en: Corner Grocery - The stores are generators of walks.
sentences.zh: 街角杂货店——商店是步行的动力。

sentences.en: When you want to grab eggs and also feel like a walk, they entice you to get out and accomplish both.
sentences.zh: 当你既想抓鸡蛋又想出去散步时，它们会诱使你出去并同时完成这两个任务。

sentences.en: Developers think people don't want to walk to local stores; this is wrong.
sentences.zh: 开发商认为人们不想步行去当地商店；这是错误的。

blocks.html_en: 90. Beer Hall - A public place where strangers and friends can gather as buddies to imbibe, sing, shout, relax, be open, and let go of sorrows. Combine this with a variety of activities (darts, dancing, a fire, etc.) Bars alone can become landing spots for the lonely.

sentences.en: Beer Hall - A public place where strangers and friends can gather as buddies to imbibe, sing, shout, relax, be open, and let go of sorrows.
sentences.zh: 啤酒厅——陌生人和朋友可以像朋友一样聚集在一起喝酒、唱歌、喊叫、放松、敞开心扉、释放悲伤的公共场所。

sentences.en: Combine this with a variety of activities (darts, dancing, a fire, etc.) Bars alone can become landing spots for the lonely.
sentences.zh: 结合各种活动（飞镖、跳舞、生火等），酒吧就可以成为孤独者的落脚点。

blocks.html_en: 91. Traveler’s Inn - Even for a stranger passing through a new place, there is a need for stories, adventures, and encounters with others in a community. Unlike a motel, make an Inn for travelers to draw energy from communal spaces and meals. Keep the scale of the Inn small.

sentences.en: Traveler’s Inn - Even for a stranger passing through a new place, there is a need for stories, adventures, and encounters with others in a community.
sentences.zh: 旅行者客栈——即使对于一个路过一个新地方的陌生人来说，也需要故事、冒险以及与社区中其他人的相遇。

sentences.en: Unlike a motel, make an Inn for travelers to draw energy from communal spaces and meals.
sentences.zh: 与汽车旅馆不同的是，为旅行者建造一家旅馆，让他们从公共空间和餐饮中汲取能量。

sentences.en: Keep the scale of the Inn small.
sentences.zh: 客栈的规模要小。

blocks.html_en: 92. Bus Stop - These spaces should form tiny centers for public life. Interweave them with newsstands, maps, outdoor shelters, seats, coffee shops, etc. They are dreary when set independently with nothing for people to experience while waiting.

sentences.en: Bus Stop - These spaces should form tiny centers for public life.
sentences.zh: 公交车站——这些空间应该成为公共生活的小型中心。

sentences.en: Interweave them with newsstands, maps, outdoor shelters, seats, coffee shops, etc. They are dreary when set independently with nothing for people to experience while waiting.
sentences.zh: 将它们与报刊亭、地图、户外候车亭、座椅、咖啡店等交织在一起。它们单独设置时显得沉闷，没有任何东西可供人们在等待时体验。

blocks.html_en: 93. Food Stands - The best food stands are operated by their owner. The same people prepare and sell the food based on their own ideas and recipes. Place them where cars and paths meet. They are not hidden, but out in the open. The more they smell, the better.

sentences.en: Food Stands - The best food stands are operated by their owner.
sentences.zh: 食品摊 - 最好的食品摊是由其所有者经营的。

sentences.en: The same people prepare and sell the food based on their own ideas and recipes.
sentences.zh: 这些人根据自己的想法和食谱准备和销售食物。

sentences.en: Place them where cars and paths meet.
sentences.zh: 将它们放置在汽车和道路交汇的地方。

sentences.en: They are not hidden, but out in the open.
sentences.zh: 它们不是隐藏的，而是公开的。

sentences.en: The more they smell, the better.
sentences.zh: 它们闻起来越多越好。

blocks.html_en: 94. Sleeping in Public - Communities feel safe when you can lay down to rest in public places that are comfortable and semi-sheltered. It's natural to nap in public. Homeless people sleeping on public benches feels like loitering because there are very few places to lie down.

sentences.en: Sleeping in Public - Communities feel safe when you can lay down to rest in public places that are comfortable and semi-sheltered.
sentences.zh: 在公共场所睡觉 - 当您可以在舒适且半遮蔽的公共场所躺下休息时，社区就会感到安全。

sentences.en: It's natural to nap in public.
sentences.zh: 在公共场合打盹是很自然的事。

sentences.en: Homeless people sleeping on public benches feels like loitering because there are very few places to lie down.
sentences.zh: 无家可归的人睡在公共长椅上感觉就像在闲逛，因为几乎没有地方可以躺下。

blocks.html_en: I send a monthly letter to fellow curious people with project updates, what I’m writing, reading, and thinking about. It's my effort to digest and make sense of both what I consume each month and what's on my mind.

sentences.en: I send a monthly letter to fellow curious people with project updates, what I’m writing, reading, and thinking about.
sentences.zh: 我每月都会向其他好奇的人发送一封信，其中包含项目更新、我正在写、读和思考的内容。

sentences.en: It's my effort to digest and make sense of both what I consume each month and what's on my mind.
sentences.zh: 我努力消化并理解我每个月消耗的东西和我的想法。

blocks.html_en: Get my 📫 Side Notes letter here. 👇

sentences.en: Get my 📫 Side Notes letter here. 👇
sentences.zh: 在这里获取我的📫附注信。 👇

blocks.html_en: Patterns 95 - 204 = Buildings

sentences.en: Patterns 95 - 204 = Buildings
sentences.zh: 图案 95 - 204 = 建筑物

blocks.html_en: What is under the control of individuals or small groups, capable of building entire patterns at once. These patterns give actual 3D shape to buildings.

sentences.en: What is under the control of individuals or small groups, capable of building entire patterns at once.
sentences.zh: 在个人或小团体的控制下，能够立即构建整个模式。

sentences.en: These patterns give actual 3D shape to buildings.
sentences.zh: 这些图案赋予建筑物真实的 3D 形状。

blocks.html_en: 95. Building Complex - A building comes alive when it is made up of smaller parts which work cohesively together. A large monolithic building is impersonal and undifferentiated, which prevents the people inside from being personal with one another.

sentences.en: Building Complex - A building comes alive when it is made up of smaller parts which work cohesively together.
sentences.zh: 建筑群——当一座建筑由多个较小的部分组成，这些较小的部分紧密结合在一起时，它就会充满活力。

sentences.en: A large monolithic building is impersonal and undifferentiated, which prevents the people inside from being personal with one another.
sentences.zh: 一座巨大的整体建筑是没有人情味和无差别的，这阻碍了里面的人彼此之间的私人交流。

blocks.html_en: 96. Number of Stories - Buildings should allow at least 50% of the ground area of any constructed spaces to remain open. Don't let the height of buildings vary too much. Adjacent buildings should especially be roughly the same height.

sentences.en: Number of Stories - Buildings should allow at least 50% of the ground area of any constructed spaces to remain open.
sentences.zh: 层数 - 建筑物应允许任何已建造空间的至少 50% 的地面面积保持开放。

sentences.en: Don't let the height of buildings vary too much.
sentences.zh: 不要让建筑物的高度相差太大。

sentences.en: Adjacent buildings should especially be roughly the same height.
sentences.zh: 相邻建筑物的高度尤其应大致相同。

blocks.html_en: 97. Shielded Parking - Place large parking lots and garages behind some kind of natural wall so that cars and the structure cannot be seen from outside. No one wants to walk by or see a dead building, which is what a parking structure becomes.

sentences.en: Shielded Parking - Place large parking lots and garages behind some kind of natural wall so that cars and the structure cannot be seen from outside.
sentences.zh: 屏蔽停车场 - 将大型停车场和车库放置在某种天然墙后面，以便从外面看不到汽车和建筑物。

sentences.en: No one wants to walk by or see a dead building, which is what a parking structure becomes.
sentences.zh: 没有人愿意走过或看到一栋死气沉沉的建筑，而这就是停车场的样子。

blocks.html_en: 98. Circulation Realms - Large buildings should be laid out to pass through different areas (realms), each marked by gateways that get smaller and smaller. Realms should be easily named, so it’s easy to direct someone where to go by describing the realm and gateway to seek.

sentences.en: Circulation Realms - Large buildings should be laid out to pass through different areas (realms), each marked by gateways that get smaller and smaller.
sentences.zh: 循环领域 - 大型建筑物应布置成穿过不同的区域（领域），每个区域都以越来越小的门户为标志。

sentences.en: Realms should be easily named, so it’s easy to direct someone where to go by describing the realm and gateway to seek.
sentences.zh: 领域应该很容易命名，因此可以通过描述领域和要寻找的门户来轻松指导某人去哪里。

blocks.html_en: 99. Main Building - "A complex of buildings with no center is like a man without a head." Decide which building is most essential and create it with a central position and higher roof to designate its importance.

sentences.en: Main Building - "A complex of buildings with no center is like a man without a head."
sentences.zh: 主楼 - “没有中心的建筑群就像一个没有头的人。”

sentences.en: Decide which building is most essential and create it with a central position and higher roof to designate its importance.
sentences.zh: 确定哪座建筑最重要，并以中心位置和较高的屋顶来指定其重要性。

blocks.html_en: 100. Pedestrian Street - People "rubbing shoulders" in public forms an important social glue. Build streets with:

sentences.en: Pedestrian Street - People "rubbing shoulders" in public forms an important social glue.
sentences.zh: 步行街——人们在公共场合“擦肩”形成了重要的社会粘合剂。

sentences.en: Build streets with:
sentences.zh: 建造街道：

blocks.html_en: 1. No cars, except for deliveries and essential cars.

sentences.en: No cars, except for deliveries and essential cars.
sentences.zh: 没有汽车，除了送货和必需的汽车。

blocks.html_en: 2. Buildings along the street where most circulation happens outside (few indoors staircases, lobbies, etc.)

sentences.en: Buildings along the street where most circulation happens outside (few indoors staircases, lobbies, etc.)
sentences.zh: 沿街的建筑物，大部分流通发生在室外（很少有室内楼梯、大堂等）

blocks.html_en: 101. Building Thoroughfare - Colder climates or high densities may force public circulation indoors. In these cases, build an indoor "street" that is nearly continuous with the outdoor street and acts as a shortcut. Line the edges with windows, places to sit, and food stands.

sentences.en: Building Thoroughfare - Colder climates or high densities may force public circulation indoors.
sentences.zh: 建设大道 - 寒冷的气候或高密度可能会迫使公共交通进入室内。

sentences.en: In these cases, build an indoor "street" that is nearly continuous with the outdoor street and acts as a shortcut.
sentences.zh: 在这些情况下，建造一条几乎与室外街道连续的室内“街道”并充当捷径。

sentences.en: Line the edges with windows, places to sit, and food stands.
sentences.zh: 边缘布置有窗户、座位和食品摊。

blocks.html_en: 102. Family of Entrances - A complex of multiple buildings can be confusing to someone arriving. Make the entrances for each individual building bold and easy to see, ideally marked by a similar kind of sign or doorway.

sentences.en: Family of Entrances - A complex of multiple buildings can be confusing to someone arriving.
sentences.zh: 入口系列 - 由多个建筑物组成的综合体可能会让到达的人感到困惑。

sentences.en: Make the entrances for each individual building bold and easy to see, ideally marked by a similar kind of sign or doorway.
sentences.zh: 使每栋建筑的入口醒目且易于看到，最好用类似的标志或门口进行标记。

blocks.html_en: 103. Small Parking Lots - Large parking lots take over the landscape and create unpleasant places in and around them. Even when parked cars take up less than 9% of the land in a community, they should be spaced out in order to avoid a vast parking lot.

sentences.en: Small Parking Lots - Large parking lots take over the landscape and create unpleasant places in and around them.
sentences.zh: 小型停车场——大型停车场占据了景观，并在其内部和周围创造了令人不快的地方。

sentences.en: Even when parked cars take up less than 9% of the land in a community, they should be spaced out in order to avoid a vast parking lot.
sentences.zh: 即使停放的汽车仅占社区土地面积的 9% 以下，也应将其间隔开，以避免出现巨大的停车场。

blocks.html_en: 104. Site Repair - Building new spaces is a chance to improve upon less pleasant areas. We want to build only in the best areas, this is wrong. Areas that are already healthy and beautiful should be left alone. Our energy for building should be used in areas that need it most.

sentences.en: Site Repair - Building new spaces is a chance to improve upon less pleasant areas.
sentences.zh: 场地修复 - 建造新空间是改善不太令人愉快的区域的机会。

sentences.en: We want to build only in the best areas, this is wrong.
sentences.zh: 我们只想在最好的地区进行建设，这是错误的。

sentences.en: Areas that are already healthy and beautiful should be left alone.
sentences.zh: 已经健康和美丽的区域应该保留。

sentences.en: Our energy for building should be used in areas that need it most.
sentences.zh: 我们的建筑能源应该用在最需要的地方。

blocks.html_en: 105. South Facing Outdoors - Open spaces get used when they are sunny. Place buildings to the north of their outdoor spaces and avoid large shade areas that separate them from the sunny area. In desert climates, people will use spaces that have a balance of sun and shade.

sentences.en: South Facing Outdoors - Open spaces get used when they are sunny.
sentences.zh: 朝南的户外——阳光明媚时使用开放空间。

sentences.en: Place buildings to the north of their outdoor spaces and avoid large shade areas that separate them from the sunny area.
sentences.zh: 将建筑物放置在室外空间的北侧，并避免将建筑物与阳光照射区域分开的大面积阴影区域。

sentences.en: In desert climates, people will use spaces that have a balance of sun and shade.
sentences.zh: 在沙漠气候下，人们会使用阳光和阴影平衡的空间。

blocks.html_en: 106. Positive Outdoor Space - People feel more comfortable in a space which is partly enclosed, especially in smaller outdoor spaces such as gardens, parks, and plazas. This is seen when a person looks for a place to sit outdoors, they look for a tree or natural covering.

sentences.en: Positive Outdoor Space - People feel more comfortable in a space which is partly enclosed, especially in smaller outdoor spaces such as gardens, parks, and plazas.
sentences.zh: 积极的户外空间——人们在部分封闭的空间中感觉更舒适，尤其是在花园、公园和广场等较小的户外空间中。

sentences.en: This is seen when a person looks for a place to sit outdoors, they look for a tree or natural covering.
sentences.zh: 当一个人寻找户外休息的地方时，他们会寻找一棵树或自然覆盖物，就会看到这种情况。

blocks.html_en: 107. Wings of Light - The presence of natural light is essential when deciding their shape. The way to achieve light on two sides is by building long and narrow wings. Wings should correspond with the social groups inside the building.

sentences.en: Wings of Light - The presence of natural light is essential when deciding their shape.
sentences.zh: 光之翼 - 在决定其形状时，自然光的存在至关重要。

sentences.en: The way to achieve light on two sides is by building long and narrow wings.
sentences.zh: 实现两侧照明的方法是建造又长又窄的机翼。

sentences.en: Wings should correspond with the social groups inside the building.
sentences.zh: 侧翼应与建筑物内的社会群体相对应。

blocks.html_en: 108. Connected Buildings - In a society where buildings lean against each other physically, people are forced to confront their neighbors, solve issues that arise, and learn to healthily adapt to others. Related to people - we don't stand alone and exist independently.

sentences.en: Connected Buildings - In a society where buildings lean against each other physically, people are forced to confront their neighbors, solve issues that arise, and learn to healthily adapt to others.
sentences.zh: 互联建筑——在一个建筑物在物理上相互倾斜的社会中，人们被迫面对邻居，解决出现的问题，并学会健康地适应他人。

sentences.en: Related to people - we don't stand alone and exist independently.
sentences.zh: 与人相关——我们不是孤立的，而是独立存在的。

blocks.html_en: 109. Long Thin House - The shape of a building effects privacy and overcrowding which determines how comfortable people feel. For small buildings, string the rooms out so the distance between them is as far as it can be, either horizontally or vertically.

sentences.en: Long Thin House - The shape of a building effects privacy and overcrowding which determines how comfortable people feel.
sentences.zh: 细长的房子——建筑物的形状会影响隐私和过度拥挤，从而决定人们的舒适度。

sentences.en: For small buildings, string the rooms out so the distance between them is as far as it can be, either horizontally or vertically.
sentences.zh: 对于小型建筑，将房间排列起来，使它们之间的距离尽可能远，无论是水平还是垂直。

blocks.html_en: 110. Main Entrance - Placement of the main entrance is critical to controls the layout and evolution of the building. People approaching from main avenues should see the entrance as soon as they see the building itself. It should contain a bold, visible shape that stands out.

sentences.en: Main Entrance - Placement of the main entrance is critical to controls the layout and evolution of the building.
sentences.zh: 主入口 - 主入口的位置对于控制建筑物的布局和演变至关重要。

sentences.en: People approaching from main avenues should see the entrance as soon as they see the building itself.
sentences.zh: 从主要大道接近的人们应该在看到建筑物本身时就看到入口。

sentences.en: It should contain a bold, visible shape that stands out.
sentences.zh: 它应该包含一个醒目的、可见的形状。

blocks.html_en: 111. Half-Hidden Garden - Gardens too close to the street feel too exposed and won't be used. If a garden is fully in the back of a house it's too far away will feel too isolated. A garden needs some privacy while keeping some connection to access the street and the entrance.

sentences.en: Half-Hidden Garden - Gardens too close to the street feel too exposed and won't be used.
sentences.zh: 半隐式花园 - 离街道太近的花园感觉太暴露，不会被使用。

sentences.en: If a garden is fully in the back of a house it's too far away will feel too isolated.
sentences.zh: 如果花园完全位于房子的后面，那么距离太远就会感觉太孤立。

sentences.en: A garden needs some privacy while keeping some connection to access the street and the entrance.
sentences.zh: 花园需要一定的隐私，同时保持与街道和入口的联系。

blocks.html_en: 112. Entrance Transition - The experience of entering a building influences the way you feel inside. If there is no transition, it will feel abrupt and as if there is no arrival. Transitions can be changes of light, sound, direction, surface, level, or a gateway to pass under.

sentences.en: Entrance Transition - The experience of entering a building influences the way you feel inside.
sentences.zh: 入口过渡 - 进入建筑物的体验会影响您在里面的感觉。

sentences.en: If there is no transition, it will feel abrupt and as if there is no arrival.
sentences.zh: 如果没有过渡，就会感觉突兀，仿佛没有到来。

sentences.en: Transitions can be changes of light, sound, direction, surface, level, or a gateway to pass under.
sentences.zh: 过渡可以是光线、声音、方向、表面、水平面或通道的变化。

blocks.html_en: 113. Car Connection - The shortest route from a parked car into the house should be the main entrance. Make the space connecting the house and car a positive space - supporting the experience of coming and going. The car space should also be taken seriously and made beautiful.

sentences.en: Car Connection - The shortest route from a parked car into the house should be the main entrance.
sentences.zh: 汽车连接 - 从停放的汽车进入房屋的最短路线应该是主入口。

sentences.en: Make the space connecting the house and car a positive space - supporting the experience of coming and going.
sentences.zh: 让连接房屋和汽车的空间成为一个积极的空间——支持来来往往的体验。

sentences.en: The car space should also be taken seriously and made beautiful.
sentences.zh: 汽车空间也应该被重视并变得美丽。

blocks.html_en: 114. Hierarchy of Open Space - Outdoors, people will try to find a spot where their backs are protected and they can look out toward a larger opening. People feel comfortable in these spaces. A natural back should be in the smaller space. Here’s an example from a private garden

sentences.en: Hierarchy of Open Space - Outdoors, people will try to find a spot where their backs are protected and they can look out toward a larger opening.
sentences.zh: 开放空间的层次结构——在户外，人们会试图找到一个可以保护背部并且可以看到更大开口的地方。

sentences.en: People feel comfortable in these spaces.
sentences.zh: 人们在这些空间中感到舒适。

sentences.en: A natural back should be in the smaller space.
sentences.zh: 自然的背部应该在较小的空间内。

sentences.en: Here’s an example from a private garden
sentences.zh: 这是一个私人花园的例子

blocks.html_en: 115. Courtyards Which Live - Place courtyards so have some view out of them to a larger open space. Ideally they are partly open to the activity that surrounds the building, yet still private. Multiple doors from the building should open into to it, creating natural paths through.

sentences.en: Courtyards Which Live - Place courtyards so have some view out of them to a larger open space.
sentences.zh: 居住的庭院 - 放置庭院时可以看到更大的开放空间。

sentences.en: Ideally they are partly open to the activity that surrounds the building, yet still private.
sentences.zh: 理想情况下，它们对建筑物周围的活动部分开放，但仍保持私密性。

sentences.en: Multiple doors from the building should open into to it, creating natural paths through.
sentences.zh: 建筑物的多扇门应打开，形成自然的路径。

blocks.html_en: 116. Cascade of Roofs - The largest and most significant gathering places should have the highest ceilings and be in the middle of the whole building because they are the social centers of activities. Smaller groups, individual rooms, and alcoves naturally fall around the edges.

sentences.en: Cascade of Roofs - The largest and most significant gathering places should have the highest ceilings and be in the middle of the whole building because they are the social centers of activities.
sentences.zh: 屋顶层叠 - 最大和最重要的聚会场所应该有最高的天花板，并且位于整个建筑的中间，因为它们是活动的社交中心。

sentences.en: Smaller groups, individual rooms, and alcoves naturally fall around the edges.
sentences.zh: 较小的团体、单独的房间和凹室自然地分布在边缘。

blocks.html_en: 117. Sheltering Roof - When a roof is hidden, its presence isn’t felt around the building and people will lack a fundamental sense of shelter. Make a vault of the roof so that its entire surface is visible, bringing the eaves down low where people pause, such as entrances.

sentences.en: Sheltering Roof - When a roof is hidden, its presence isn’t felt around the building and people will lack a fundamental sense of shelter.
sentences.zh: 遮蔽屋顶——当屋顶被隐藏时，建筑物周围感觉不到它的存在，人们将缺乏基本的遮蔽感。

sentences.en: Make a vault of the roof so that its entire surface is visible, bringing the eaves down low where people pause, such as entrances.
sentences.zh: 制作一个拱顶屋顶，使其整个表面可见，将屋檐降低到人们停下来的地方，例如入口处。

blocks.html_en: 118. Roof Garden - Make at least one small roof garden in every building to take advantage of the sun and open air. They can be used for planting, sitting, and sleeping outside. It should be possible to walk directly out to the roof garden directly from some lived-in part.

sentences.en: Roof Garden - Make at least one small roof garden in every building to take advantage of the sun and open air.
sentences.zh: 屋顶花园——每栋建筑至少建一个小型屋顶花园，以充分利用阳光和露天环境。

sentences.en: They can be used for planting, sitting, and sleeping outside.
sentences.zh: 它们可用于种植、在户外休息和睡觉。

sentences.en: It should be possible to walk directly out to the roof garden directly from some lived-in part.
sentences.zh: 应该可以从居住的地方直接走到屋顶花园。

blocks.html_en: 119. Arcades - Arcades are covered walkways at the edge of buildings - partly inside and outside. Use arcades to connect buildings and allow people to walk from place to place under the cover. They create friendly invitations for people to interact with buildings.

sentences.en: Arcades - Arcades are covered walkways at the edge of buildings - partly inside and outside.
sentences.zh: 拱廊 - 拱廊是位于建筑物边缘的有盖走道 - 部分位于内部和外部。

sentences.en: Use arcades to connect buildings and allow people to walk from place to place under the cover.
sentences.zh: 使用拱廊连接建筑物，并允许人们在掩护下从一个地方走到另一个地方。

sentences.en: They create friendly invitations for people to interact with buildings.
sentences.zh: 他们为人们与建筑物互动发出友好的邀请。

blocks.html_en: 120. Paths and Goals - Paths must be compatible with walking. Ideally they are straight or gently curving between goals. Ordinary things outdoors can all be goals - trees, fountains, entrances, seats, statues, swings, or outdoor rooms.

sentences.en: Paths and Goals - Paths must be compatible with walking.
sentences.zh: 路径和目标 - 路径必须与步行兼容。

sentences.en: Ideally they are straight or gently curving between goals.
sentences.zh: 理想情况下，它们是直的或在目标之间轻轻弯曲。

sentences.en: Ordinary things outdoors can all be goals - trees, fountains, entrances, seats, statues, swings, or outdoor rooms.
sentences.zh: 户外的普通事物都可以是目标——树木、喷泉、入口、座位、雕像、秋千或室外房间。

blocks.html_en: 121. Path Shape - Make a bulge in the middle of a path with narrower ends. This will create a place for people to stay in to meander and not just pass through.

sentences.en: Path Shape - Make a bulge in the middle of a path with narrower ends.
sentences.zh: 路径形状 - 在两端较窄的路径中间形成一个凸起。

sentences.en: This will create a place for people to stay in to meander and not just pass through.
sentences.zh: 这将为人们创造一个可以停留的地方，让人们蜿蜒而不仅仅是路过。

blocks.html_en: 122. Building Fronts - Creating buildings to be set-back from the street has discouraged social interaction in the streets. Instead, place buildings right up to paths and streets and let them take on uneven angles to accommodate the shape of the street.

sentences.en: Building Fronts - Creating buildings to be set-back from the street has discouraged social interaction in the streets.
sentences.zh: 建筑正面——建造远离街道的建筑阻碍了街道上的社交互动。

sentences.en: Instead, place buildings right up to paths and streets and let them take on uneven angles to accommodate the shape of the street.
sentences.zh: 相反，将建筑物直接放置在道路和街道上，并让它们呈现不均匀的角度以适应街道的形状。

blocks.html_en: 123. Pedestrian Density - The number of square feet per person gives a general estimate of the liveliness of a space. These exact numbers are subjective but at 150 sq. ft./person, an area is lively. If more than 500 sq. ft./person, an area begins to feel dead.

sentences.en: Pedestrian Density - The number of square feet per person gives a general estimate of the liveliness of a space.
sentences.zh: 行人密度——每人的平方英尺数可以对空间的活跃度进行总体估计。

sentences.en: These exact numbers are subjective but at 150 sq.
sentences.zh: 这些确切的数字是主观的，但在 150 平方英尺的情况下。

sentences.en: ft./person, an area is lively.
sentences.zh: 英尺/人，该地区很热闹。

sentences.en: If more than 500 sq.
sentences.zh: 如果超过500平方

sentences.en: ft./person, an area begins to feel dead.
sentences.zh: 英尺/人，一个区域开始感觉死气沉沉。

blocks.html_en: 124. Activity Pockets - People naturally gather around a square’s edge. If the edge fails, then the space doesn’t become lively. Fill the edges with pockets of activity. These can include arcades, seats, sitting walls, columns, trellises, outdoor rooms, cafes, food stands, etc.

sentences.en: Activity Pockets - People naturally gather around a square’s edge.
sentences.zh: 活动区——人们自然地聚集在广场的边缘。

sentences.en: If the edge fails, then the space doesn’t become lively.
sentences.zh: 如果边缘失效，那么空间就不会变得活跃。

sentences.en: Fill the edges with pockets of activity.
sentences.zh: 用活动的口袋填充边缘。

sentences.en: These can include arcades, seats, sitting walls, columns, trellises, outdoor rooms, cafes, food stands, etc.
sentences.zh: 这些可以包括拱廊、座位、坐墙、柱子、格子、室外房间、咖啡馆、小吃摊等。

blocks.html_en: 125. Stair Seats - When there is action in a place, the most inviting spots are high enough to provide a vantage point, yet low enough to feel in the action. Make them accessible from below so that people may gather, sit, and watch what’s going on.

sentences.en: Stair Seats - When there is action in a place, the most inviting spots are high enough to provide a vantage point, yet low enough to feel in the action.
sentences.zh: 楼梯座位 - 当一个地方有活动时，最吸引人的位置足够高，可以提供有利的位置，但又足够低，可以感受到活动的感觉。

sentences.en: Make them accessible from below so that people may gather, sit, and watch what’s going on.
sentences.zh: 让它们可以从下面进入，以便人们可以聚集、坐下来观看正在发生的事情。

blocks.html_en: 126. Something Roughly in the Middle - A public space should contain something to stand in its middle, otherwise it will likely remain empty. A fountains, tree, statue, clocktower, or bandstand all work. Place it where the paths come together, not exactly in the middle.

sentences.en: Something Roughly in the Middle - A public space should contain something to stand in its middle, otherwise it will likely remain empty.
sentences.zh: 大致在中间的东西——公共空间应该在中间放置一些东西，否则它可能会保持空置。

sentences.en: A fountains, tree, statue, clocktower, or bandstand all work.
sentences.zh: 喷泉、树、雕像、钟楼或演奏台都可以。

sentences.en: Place it where the paths come together, not exactly in the middle.
sentences.zh: 将其放置在路径交汇处，而不是正好在中间。

blocks.html_en: 127. Intimacy Gradient - Lay out the space in a building to create a sequence that corresponds to the degrees of privateness. Begin with the entrance and the most public parts, eventually leading to the most private domains.

sentences.en: Intimacy Gradient - Lay out the space in a building to create a sequence that corresponds to the degrees of privateness.
sentences.zh: 亲密梯度——对建筑物中的空间进行布局，以创建与私密程度相对应的序列。

sentences.en: Begin with the entrance and the most public parts, eventually leading to the most private domains.
sentences.zh: 从入口和最公共的部分开始，最终通向最私密的区域。

blocks.html_en: 128. Indoor Sunlight - The most important rooms in a building should be placed along the south edge. A house is bright and cheerful when the right rooms are facing south. Sun shining into a room has one of the greatest effects on its feeling. *written for the Northern Hemisphere

sentences.en: Indoor Sunlight - The most important rooms in a building should be placed along the south edge.
sentences.zh: 室内阳光 - 建筑物中最重要的房间应放置在南边缘。

sentences.en: A house is bright and cheerful when the right rooms are facing south.
sentences.zh: 当正确的房间朝南时，房子就会明亮而愉快。

sentences.en: Sun shining into a room has one of the greatest effects on its feeling. *written for the Northern Hemisphere
sentences.zh: 阳光照进房间对其感觉影响最大的因素之一。 *针对北半球编写

blocks.html_en: 129. Common Areas at the Heart - All social groups' survival depends on constant informal contact between its members. Place a single common area for members to frequently pass by, tangentially. They can easily pop in to see what's going on if they want or keep going past.

sentences.en: Common Areas at the Heart - All social groups' survival depends on constant informal contact between its members.
sentences.zh: 核心的共同领域——所有社会群体的生存都依赖于其成员之间持续的非正式接触。

sentences.en: Place a single common area for members to frequently pass by, tangentially.
sentences.zh: 放置一个公共区域，供成员经常路过。

sentences.en: They can easily pop in to see what's going on if they want or keep going past.
sentences.zh: 如果他们愿意，他们可以很容易地进来看看发生了什么，或者继续过去。

blocks.html_en: 130. Entrance Room - Create a room to enter through, both inside and outside of the building. This space is used for basic arrival and goodbye tendencies. People want to see who’s at the door, provide shelter, space to take off shoes and coats, and somewhere to place things.

sentences.en: Entrance Room - Create a room to enter through, both inside and outside of the building.
sentences.zh: 入口室 - 创建一个可以进入建筑物内部和外部的房间。

sentences.en: This space is used for basic arrival and goodbye tendencies.
sentences.zh: 这个空间用于基本的到达和告别倾向。

sentences.en: People want to see who’s at the door, provide shelter, space to take off shoes and coats, and somewhere to place things.
sentences.zh: 人们希望看到谁在门口，提供庇护所、脱鞋脱衣的空间以及放置物品的地方。

blocks.html_en: 131. The Flow Through Rooms - When possible, use public and common rooms for movement and gathering rather than corridors or passages. Allow for circulation from room to room to pass in wide, circular loops with views of fires and windows.

sentences.en: The Flow Through Rooms - When possible, use public and common rooms for movement and gathering rather than corridors or passages.
sentences.zh: 穿过房间的流动 - 如果可能，使用公共和公共房间进行活动和聚会，而不是走廊或通道。

sentences.en: Allow for circulation from room to room to pass in wide, circular loops with views of fires and windows.
sentences.zh: 允许从一个房间到另一个房间的流通，形成宽阔的圆形环路，可以看到火和窗户的景色。

blocks.html_en: 132. Short Passages - Create passages to be like rooms, with carpets or wood floors, furniture, book shelves, and windows. The ideal case is a one-side hall, lined with windows on its open side.

sentences.en: Short Passages - Create passages to be like rooms, with carpets or wood floors, furniture, book shelves, and windows.
sentences.zh: 短通道 - 创建类似房间的通道，配有地毯或木地板、家具、书架和窗户。

sentences.en: The ideal case is a one-side hall, lined with windows on its open side.
sentences.zh: 理想的情况是一个单侧的大厅，其开放的一侧排列着窗户。

blocks.html_en: 133. Staircase as a Stage - Place the main stair in a central, visible position. Create the staircase so that it’s one with a room. Include wide stairs at the bottom to encourage stair seating.

sentences.en: Staircase as a Stage - Place the main stair in a central, visible position.
sentences.zh: 楼梯作为舞台 - 将主楼梯放置在中央可见的位置。

sentences.en: Create the staircase so that it’s one with a room.
sentences.zh: 创建楼梯，使其成为一个带有房间的楼梯。

sentences.en: Include wide stairs at the bottom to encourage stair seating.
sentences.zh: 底部设有宽阔的楼梯，以鼓励楼梯座位。

blocks.html_en: 134. Zen View - Place the windows and areas to see a beautiful view so people glimpse the view as they pass it. Avoid making it the main view from where people gather. The more open and obvious the view is, the sooner it fades. It becomes part of the building, like wallpaper.

sentences.en: Zen View - Place the windows and areas to see a beautiful view so people glimpse the view as they pass it.
sentences.zh: 禅宗景观 - 将窗户和区域放置在可以看到美丽景色的位置，以便人们在经过时可以瞥见景色。

sentences.en: Avoid making it the main view from where people gather.
sentences.zh: 避免使其成为人们聚集的主要景观。

sentences.en: The more open and obvious the view is, the sooner it fades.
sentences.zh: 视野越开阔、越明显，它就会消失得越快。

sentences.en: It becomes part of the building, like wallpaper.
sentences.zh: 它像壁纸一样成为建筑物的一部分。

blocks.html_en: 135. Tapestry of Light and Dark - Buildings need alternating areas of light and dark. People are phototropic and attracted to the light. Use light to guide them to important places (seats, entrances, stairs, passages, etc.).

sentences.en: Tapestry of Light and Dark - Buildings need alternating areas of light and dark.
sentences.zh: 光明与黑暗的挂毯 - 建筑物需要交替的光明和黑暗区域。

sentences.en: People are phototropic and attracted to the light.
sentences.zh: 人具有向光性，会被光所吸引。

sentences.en: Use light to guide them to important places (seats, entrances, stairs, passages, etc.).
sentences.zh: 用灯光引导他们到重要的地方（座位、入口、楼梯、通道等）。

blocks.html_en: 136. Couple’s Realm - Part of a house should be distinct from children’s areas and allow parents to be together in private. When children can run everywhere in the house, they tend to dominate it all. Their role as parents rather than a couple permeates the entire relationship.

sentences.en: Couple’s Realm - Part of a house should be distinct from children’s areas and allow parents to be together in private.
sentences.zh: 情侣领域——房子的一部分应该与儿童区域区分开来，并允许父母私下在一起。

sentences.en: When children can run everywhere in the house, they tend to dominate it all.
sentences.zh: 当孩子们可以在家里到处乱跑时，他们往往会主宰一切。

sentences.en: Their role as parents rather than a couple permeates the entire relationship.
sentences.zh: 他们作为父母而不是夫妻的角色渗透到整个关系中。

blocks.html_en: 137. Children’s Realm - Children need a space to release their large amounts of energy. The space should be a continuum of areas inside and outside of the house to allow their variety of play. Keep the couple’s realm and private spaces entirely separate from these play areas.

sentences.en: Children’s Realm - Children need a space to release their large amounts of energy.
sentences.zh: 儿童天地——孩子需要一个空间来释放他们大量的能量。

sentences.en: The space should be a continuum of areas inside and outside of the house to allow their variety of play.
sentences.zh: 该空间应该是房屋内外区域的连续体，以允许他们进行各种玩耍。

sentences.en: Keep the couple’s realm and private spaces entirely separate from these play areas.
sentences.zh: 将夫妻的领域和私人空间与这些游乐区完全分开。

blocks.html_en: 138. Sleeping to the East - Position the rooms where people sleep so they wake up with the sun and light. Beyond following our natural rhythm, people want to look out and see what kind of day its going to be. A good morning view can provide this information well.

sentences.en: Sleeping to the East - Position the rooms where people sleep so they wake up with the sun and light.
sentences.zh: 睡向东方——将房间放置在人们睡觉的地方，这样他们就能在阳光下醒来。

sentences.en: Beyond following our natural rhythm, people want to look out and see what kind of day its going to be.
sentences.zh: 除了遵循我们的自然节奏之外，人们还想看看今天会是什么样。

sentences.en: A good morning view can provide this information well.
sentences.zh: 美好的早晨景色可以很好地提供这些信息。

blocks.html_en: 139. Farmhouse Kitchen - Integrate kitchen work and family activity in one big room. Make the area bright, comfortable, and large enough to hold a big table, long counters, and stove/sink around the edge. Cooking and eating are enjoyable and ways we "take care of ourselves."

sentences.en: Farmhouse Kitchen - Integrate kitchen work and family activity in one big room.
sentences.zh: 农舍厨房 - 将厨房工作和家庭活动整合在一个大房间里。

sentences.en: Make the area bright, comfortable, and large enough to hold a big table, long counters, and stove/sink around the edge.
sentences.zh: 使该区域明亮、舒适且足够大，可以容纳一张大桌子、长柜台和边缘的炉子/水槽。

sentences.en: Cooking and eating are enjoyable and ways we "take care of ourselves."
sentences.zh: 烹饪和饮食是令人愉快的，也是我们“照顾自己”的方式。

blocks.html_en: 140. Private Terrace on the Street - Common rooms in the house should open out to a space that looks into the street, rather directly to the street. Raise the terrace slightly above the street and include a low wall.

sentences.en: Private Terrace on the Street - Common rooms in the house should open out to a space that looks into the street, rather directly to the street.
sentences.zh: 街道上的私人露台 - 房子里的公共房间应该通向一个可以看到街道的空间，而不是直接面对街道。

sentences.en: Raise the terrace slightly above the street and include a low wall.
sentences.zh: 将露台稍微抬高到街道上方并包括一堵矮墙。

blocks.html_en: 141. A Room of One’s Own - Everyone needs opportunities to be alone if they will be close to others. Give each family member a room of their own, including at minimum a desk, alcove, and shelves. Place these at the far end of the intimacy gradient (Pattern 127).

sentences.en: A Room of One’s Own - Everyone needs opportunities to be alone if they will be close to others.
sentences.zh: 自己的房间——每个人都需要独处的机会，才能与他人亲近。

sentences.en: Give each family member a room of their own, including at minimum a desk, alcove, and shelves.
sentences.zh: 给每个家庭成员一个自己的房间，至少包括一张桌子、壁龛和架子。

sentences.en: Place these at the far end of the intimacy gradient (Pattern 127).
sentences.zh: 将它们放置在亲密梯度的远端（图案 127）。

blocks.html_en: 142. Sequence of Sitting Spaces - Corners and alcoves in buildings are all potential sitting spaces. Build them with various degrees of intimacy. The most formal ones to be enclosed entirely and the least formal to be in the corners without any screen or barrier blocking them.

sentences.en: Sequence of Sitting Spaces - Corners and alcoves in buildings are all potential sitting spaces.
sentences.zh: 就座空间的顺序 - 建筑物中的角落和壁龛都是潜在的就座空间。

sentences.en: Build them with various degrees of intimacy.
sentences.zh: 建立不同程度的亲密关系。

sentences.en: The most formal ones to be enclosed entirely and the least formal to be in the corners without any screen or barrier blocking them.
sentences.zh: 最正式的房间是完全封闭的，最不正式的房间是在角落里，没有任何屏幕或障碍物阻挡它们。

blocks.html_en: 143. Bed Cluster - Children need a private place, many young children feel isolated if they sleep alone. Place the children’s bed in alcoves they can retreat to around a common play space. Avoid walls or doors, instead use curtains for the alcoves if needed.

sentences.en: Bed Cluster - Children need a private place, many young children feel isolated if they sleep alone.
sentences.zh: 床群——孩子们需要一个私人的地方，许多幼儿如果独自睡觉会感到孤立。

sentences.en: Place the children’s bed in alcoves they can retreat to around a common play space.
sentences.zh: 将孩子们的床放在他们可以在公共游乐空间周围休息的凹室中。

sentences.en: Avoid walls or doors, instead use curtains for the alcoves if needed.
sentences.zh: 避免使用墙壁或门，如果需要，可以在凹室使用窗帘。

blocks.html_en: 144. Bathing Room - Bathing needs to be a positive and energizing pleasure. Place the bathing room, toilets, and showers in a single tiled area in the house. Build it beside the couple’s realm (136) and if possible give it access to outside (tiny balcony or walled garden).

sentences.en: Bathing Room - Bathing needs to be a positive and energizing pleasure.
sentences.zh: 浴室——沐浴应该是一种积极、充满活力的乐趣。

sentences.en: Place the bathing room, toilets, and showers in a single tiled area in the house.
sentences.zh: 将浴室、厕所和淋浴间放置在房屋内的单一瓷砖区域中。

sentences.en: Build it beside the couple’s realm (136) and if possible give it access to outside (tiny balcony or walled garden).
sentences.zh: 将其建在夫妇俩的领地 (136) 旁边，如果可能的话，让它可以通往室外（小阳台或围墙花园）。

blocks.html_en: 145. Bulk Storage - Where people live and work, there is some need for storing items that aren’t used everyday but also not ready to throw out. Plan for this area from the beginning and place it where it costs less to build.

sentences.en: Bulk Storage - Where people live and work, there is some need for storing items that aren’t used everyday but also not ready to throw out.
sentences.zh: 大容量存储——人们生活和工作的地方，需要存储日常不使用但又不准备扔掉的物品。

sentences.en: Plan for this area from the beginning and place it where it costs less to build.
sentences.zh: 从一开始就规划这个区域，并将其放置在建造成本较低的地方。

blocks.html_en: 146. Flexible Office Space - Office workers need space that is both well-adapted to specific work arrangements and truly flexible.

sentences.en: Flexible Office Space - Office workers need space that is both well-adapted to specific work arrangements and truly flexible.
sentences.zh: 灵活的办公空间——办公室工作人员需要既能很好地适应特定工作安排又能真正灵活的空间。

blocks.html_en: 147. Communal Eating - Without communal eating, human groups cannot hold together. Make communal meals regular so they become important and comfortable events with room for guests.

sentences.en: Communal Eating - Without communal eating, human groups cannot hold together.
sentences.zh: 公共饮食——没有公共饮食，人类群体就无法团结在一起。

sentences.en: Make communal meals regular so they become important and comfortable events with room for guests.
sentences.zh: 定期举办公共聚餐，使其成为重要且舒适的活动，并为客人提供空间。

blocks.html_en: 148. Small Work Groups - Split up work groups into small, spatially dedicated teams. Each person on the team should at least have partial view of the other members. Create a way for them to easily share common areas such as the entrance, kitchen, equipment, and bathrooms.

sentences.en: Small Work Groups - Split up work groups into small, spatially dedicated teams.
sentences.zh: 小型工作组 - 将工作组分成小型的、空间专用的团队。

sentences.en: Each person on the team should at least have partial view of the other members.
sentences.zh: 团队中的每个人至少应该对其他成员有部分了解。

sentences.en: Create a way for them to easily share common areas such as the entrance, kitchen, equipment, and bathrooms.
sentences.zh: 为他们创造一种轻松共享公共区域的方式，例如入口、厨房、设备和浴室。

blocks.html_en: 149. Reception Welcomes You - A person should feel at ease when entering a building. In the entrance, arrange things to welcome guests - soft chairs, food, coffee, fireplace. Place the receptionist to one side, so they can get up and walk toward the people and greet them.

sentences.en: Reception Welcomes You - A person should feel at ease when entering a building.
sentences.zh: 接待处欢迎您 - 进入建筑物时应该感到轻松。

sentences.en: In the entrance, arrange things to welcome guests - soft chairs, food, coffee, fireplace.
sentences.zh: 在入口处布置好迎接客人的物品——柔软的椅子、食物、咖啡、壁炉。

sentences.en: Place the receptionist to one side, so they can get up and walk toward the people and greet them.
sentences.zh: 将接待员放在一侧，以便他们可以站起来走向人们并向他们打招呼。

blocks.html_en: 150. A Place to Wait - The process of waiting creates uncertainties and you can't enjoy the time because it's unpredictable; you don't know when your turn will come. Create positive waiting spaces. Fuse it with activities (reading, games, coffee) or a way to enjoy silence.

sentences.en: A Place to Wait - The process of waiting creates uncertainties and you can't enjoy the time because it's unpredictable; you don't know when your turn will come.
sentences.zh: 等待的地方——等待的过程会产生不确定性，你无法享受这段时光，因为它是不可预测的；你不知道什么时候轮到你。

sentences.en: Create positive waiting spaces.
sentences.zh: 创造积极的等待空间。

sentences.en: Fuse it with activities (reading, games, coffee) or a way to enjoy silence.
sentences.zh: 将其与活动（阅读、游戏、咖啡）或享受安静的方式融合在一起。

blocks.html_en: 151. Small Meeting Rooms - The larger meetings are, the less people will get out of them. Make the majority of meetings spaces small, for 12 people or less. Ideally, in the most public areas scattered around the workspace.

sentences.en: Small Meeting Rooms - The larger meetings are, the less people will get out of them.
sentences.zh: 小型会议室——会议规模越大，参加会议的人数就越少。

sentences.en: Make the majority of meetings spaces small, for 12 people or less.
sentences.zh: 将大部分会议空间缩小，容纳 12 人或更少。

sentences.en: Ideally, in the most public areas scattered around the workspace.
sentences.zh: 理想情况下，在分散在工作空间周围的大多数公共区域。

blocks.html_en: 153. Rooms to Rent - The need for space in a building grows and shrinks with time. Create part of the building to be rentable if unused. It will need a private entrance and direct access to a bathroom that will not require passing through the main areas.

sentences.en: Rooms to Rent - The need for space in a building grows and shrinks with time.
sentences.zh: 出租房间 - 建筑物中的空间需求随着时间的推移而增加或减少。

sentences.en: Create part of the building to be rentable if unused.
sentences.zh: 创建建筑物的一部分，以便在未使用时可供出租。

sentences.en: It will need a private entrance and direct access to a bathroom that will not require passing through the main areas.
sentences.zh: 它将需要一个私人入口并直接进入浴室，而无需穿过主要区域。

blocks.html_en: 154. Teenager’s Cottage - A teenager’s space in the home needs to reflect their desired independence, otherwise they will feel locked in conflict with the rest of the family. Keep it attached to the house but ideally far away from the master bedroom and with a private entrance

sentences.en: Teenager’s Cottage - A teenager’s space in the home needs to reflect their desired independence, otherwise they will feel locked in conflict with the rest of the family.
sentences.zh: 青少年小屋——青少年的家中空间需要体现他们渴望的独立性，否则他们会感到与家庭其他成员发生冲突。

sentences.en: Keep it attached to the house but ideally far away from the master bedroom and with a private entrance
sentences.zh: 让它与房子相连，但最好远离主卧室，并有一个私人入口

blocks.html_en: 155. Old Age Cottage - Old people face a conflict. Life pushes them to be independent (kids move away, neighborhood changes, friends and loved ones die) while they naturally become more dependent on others. Provide a small cottage nearby for them, placed at ground level.

sentences.en: Old Age Cottage - Old people face a conflict.
sentences.zh: 老年小屋——老年人面临着冲突。

sentences.en: Life pushes them to be independent (kids move away, neighborhood changes, friends and loved ones die) while they naturally become more dependent on others.
sentences.zh: 生活迫使他们变​​得独立（孩子搬走、邻居改变、朋友和亲人去世），而他们自然而然地变得更加依赖他人。

sentences.en: Provide a small cottage nearby for them, placed at ground level.
sentences.zh: 在附近为他们提供一间位于地面的小小屋。

blocks.html_en: 156. Settled Work - Settled work is the activity that becomes an extension of the person. This kind of work that develops gradually over a lifetime. Provide space for a workplace that can grow slowly to accommodate a weekend hobby at first then eventually a complete workshop.

sentences.en: Settled Work - Settled work is the activity that becomes an extension of the person.
sentences.zh: 固定工作——固定工作是成为人的延伸的活动。

sentences.en: This kind of work that develops gradually over a lifetime.
sentences.zh: 这种工作是在一生中逐渐发展的。

sentences.en: Provide space for a workplace that can grow slowly to accommodate a weekend hobby at first then eventually a complete workshop.
sentences.zh: 为工作场所提供空间，该空间可以慢慢发展以适应周末的爱好，最终成为一个完整的工作室。

blocks.html_en: 157. Home Workshop - Make a place in the home where work beyond hobbies can be done. A home workshop becomes more important, the more decentralized work is. Allow it to be partially seen from the street so people can see in and interact.

sentences.en: Home Workshop - Make a place in the home where work beyond hobbies can be done.
sentences.zh: 家庭工作室——在家中打造一个可以完成业余爱好之外的工作的地方。

sentences.en: A home workshop becomes more important, the more decentralized work is.
sentences.zh: 工作越分散，家庭工作室就变得越重要。

sentences.en: Allow it to be partially seen from the street so people can see in and interact.
sentences.zh: 允许从街道上看到它的一部分，以便人们可以看到并互动。

blocks.html_en: 158. Open Stairs - Apartments on the upper floors of a building need direct stair access to the street. This keeps the spaces connected to the world around, open, and free-flowing. Keep the stairs roofed or unroofed depending on climate.

sentences.en: Open Stairs - Apartments on the upper floors of a building need direct stair access to the street.
sentences.zh: 开放式楼梯 - 位于建筑物较高楼层的公寓需要通过楼梯直接通往街道。

sentences.en: This keeps the spaces connected to the world around, open, and free-flowing.
sentences.zh: 这使得空间与周围的世界保持联系、开放和自由流动。

sentences.en: Keep the stairs roofed or unroofed depending on climate.
sentences.zh: 根据气候情况，保持楼梯有屋顶或无屋顶。

blocks.html_en: 159. Light on Two Sides of Every Room - People will gravitate to rooms with natural light on two sides. Light from two sides limits the glare on others’ faces, allowing people to understand each other better through clear facial expressions and hand motions.

sentences.en: Light on Two Sides of Every Room - People will gravitate to rooms with natural light on two sides.
sentences.zh: 每个房间两侧都有光线——人们会倾向于两侧都有自然光的房间。

sentences.en: Light from two sides limits the glare on others’ faces, allowing people to understand each other better through clear facial expressions and hand motions.
sentences.zh: 两侧的光线限制了他人脸上的眩光，让人们通过清晰的面部表情和手势更好地了解对方。

blocks.html_en: 160. Building Edge - Create building edges to have a use on their own. Make them places that invite people to stop, sit, lean, or cover from the weather.

sentences.en: Building Edge - Create building edges to have a use on their own.
sentences.zh: 建筑边缘 - 创建建筑边缘以供其使用。

sentences.en: Make them places that invite people to stop, sit, lean, or cover from the weather.
sentences.zh: 让它们成为吸引人们驻足、坐下、倚靠或躲避天气的地方。

blocks.html_en: 161. Sunny Place - Develop the area immediately outside of a building on the south side into a place for people to bask in it. Create an important room, place to work, or to play here so that it draws people towards using it regularly. Try to shelter the area from the wind.

sentences.en: Sunny Place - Develop the area immediately outside of a building on the south side into a place for people to bask in it.
sentences.zh: 阳光之地 - 将南侧建筑物外的区域开发成供人们晒太阳的地方。

sentences.en: Create an important room, place to work, or to play here so that it draws people towards using it regularly.
sentences.zh: 在这里创建一个重要的房间、工作或娱乐场所，以吸引人们经常使用它。

sentences.en: Try to shelter the area from the wind.
sentences.zh: 尽量让该区域避风。

blocks.html_en: 162. North Face - The North sides of buildings will be dark and gloomy for most of the year. On these sides, make a cascade so that the little sun on that side is not blocked even more. Use these sides for things that don't need the sun, such as car shelter or storage.

sentences.en: North Face - The North sides of buildings will be dark and gloomy for most of the year.
sentences.zh: 北面 - 建筑物的北侧在一年中的大部分时间里都是黑暗和阴暗的。

sentences.en: On these sides, make a cascade so that the little sun on that side is not blocked even more.
sentences.zh: 在这些侧面，制作一个瀑布，这样一侧的小太阳就不会被更多地遮挡。

sentences.en: Use these sides for things that don't need the sun, such as car shelter or storage.
sentences.zh: 将这些侧面用于不需要阳光的地方，例如汽车遮蔽处或储藏室。

blocks.html_en: 163. Outdoor Room - Include a partly closed outdoor room for outdoor needs not met by a garden. Build a space for people to eat, sit in formal clothes, drink, talk, and be still, yet outside. Use different elements (trellis, foliage on walls, columns, etc) to form a room.

sentences.en: Outdoor Room - Include a partly closed outdoor room for outdoor needs not met by a garden.
sentences.zh: 室外房间 - 包括一个部分封闭的室外房间，以满足花园无法满足的户外需求。

sentences.en: Build a space for people to eat, sit in formal clothes, drink, talk, and be still, yet outside.
sentences.zh: 为人们建造一个可以吃饭、穿着正装就座、喝酒、交谈、保持安静的空间，但都在室外。

sentences.en: Use different elements (trellis, foliage on walls, columns, etc) to form a room.
sentences.zh: 使用不同的元素（格子、墙壁上的树叶、柱子等）来形成一个房间。

blocks.html_en: 164. Street Windows - Buildings along busy streets should have windows to look out onto the street. Ideal street windows are on the second and third floors. Higher up makes them “a view” and at ground level they may have to be covered up for privacy.

sentences.en: Street Windows - Buildings along busy streets should have windows to look out onto the street.
sentences.zh: 街道窗户——繁忙街道上的建筑物应该有窗户可以看到街道。

sentences.en: Ideal street windows are on the second and third floors.
sentences.zh: 理想的临街窗户位于二楼和三楼。

sentences.en: Higher up makes them “a view” and at ground level they may have to be covered up for privacy.
sentences.zh: 较高的地方使它们成为“风景”，而在地面上，为了保护隐私，它们可能必须被遮盖起来。

blocks.html_en: 165. Opening to the Street - Seeing action encourages more action. Open up a space on the street side and include some part of the activity on the far side of the pedestrian path. People passing by will walk through it and see inside.

sentences.en: Opening to the Street - Seeing action encourages more action.
sentences.zh: 向街头开放——看到行动鼓励更多行动。

sentences.en: Open up a space on the street side and include some part of the activity on the far side of the pedestrian path.
sentences.zh: 在街道一侧开辟一个空间，并在人行道的另一侧包括一些活动。

sentences.en: People passing by will walk through it and see inside.
sentences.zh: 路过的人都会走进去看看里面。

blocks.html_en: 166. Gallery Surround - Build balconies and terraces at the edges of buildings. These will help buildings to feel intertwined with both the people walking out onto them and those looking at them from outside.

sentences.en: Gallery Surround - Build balconies and terraces at the edges of buildings.
sentences.zh: 画廊环绕 - 在建筑物边缘建造阳台和露台。

sentences.en: These will help buildings to feel intertwined with both the people walking out onto them and those looking at them from outside.
sentences.zh: 这些将使建筑物与走进建筑物的人和从外面观看建筑物的人产生交织在一起的感觉。

blocks.html_en: 167. Six-Foot Balcony - Balconies and porches less than six feet deep are hardly used. Ideally make them half-enclosed and recessed into the building slightly too.

sentences.en: Six-Foot Balcony - Balconies and porches less than six feet deep are hardly used.
sentences.zh: 六英尺阳台 - 深度低于六英尺的阳台和门廊几乎不被使用。

sentences.en: Ideally make them half-enclosed and recessed into the building slightly too.
sentences.zh: 理想情况下，将它们半封闭并稍微凹入建筑物内。

blocks.html_en: 168. Connection to the Earth - Deliberately place paths, terraces, and steps around the edge of a building to connect it to the natural landscape surrounding it. Make the boundary of building and earth ambiguous.

sentences.en: Connection to the Earth - Deliberately place paths, terraces, and steps around the edge of a building to connect it to the natural landscape surrounding it.
sentences.zh: 与地球的联系——在建筑物边缘故意放置路径、露台和台阶，将其与周围的自然景观连接起来。

sentences.en: Make the boundary of building and earth ambiguous.
sentences.zh: 使建筑与大地的界限变得模糊。
